title: Chesty Goober Cure
description: A smoky and gooey Malaysian malay dish featuring chestnut mushroom, tempered with a low-carb-friendly twist to cure hangovers in style.

ingredients.name: Bacan Tempering Paste (optional)
ingredients.notes: For low-carb version, use 1/3 of the Bacan Tempering Paste

instructions: In a pan, melt the ghee over medium heat.
Add sliced Chestnut Mushroom and cook until they release their moisture.
Pour in the Chicken Stock and let it simmer for about 5 minutes to concentrate flavors.
If using Bacan Tempering Paste, add it gradually while stirring continuously until no more clumps form.
Season with salt and fresh ginger slices. Stir well.
Garnish with chopped cilantro before serving.
